# Description

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New example variant in `examples/`
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other (describe)

- [ ] Deployed to a fresh Firebase project
- [ ] Tested on mobile (iOS / Android)
- [ ] Verified Code Tester logs the new behavior
- [ ] Manual test steps documented (see below)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (one file, one feature; no monolithic components)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `MANUAL.pdf`, or `docs/`)
- [ ] I have added myself to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if appropriate
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have not increased `App.jsx` beyond ~150 lines (extracted into new components if needed)
- [ ] I have updated all 7 version sync points if I bumped the version
